creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-11-01 03:04:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/bzr-git        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  bzr-git is a plugin for bzr to work with git trees. All operations except for
  "push" are supported.
  
  www: https://launchpad.net/bzr-git
  
  PR:             ports/151823
  Submitted by:   Carlo Strub <c-s at c-s.li>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4098    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/bzr-git/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/bzr-git/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/bzr-git/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +132 -0    ports/devel/bzr-git/pkg-plist (new)
